response.original_title: Cooking with Legends: Lidia Bastianich & Jacques Pepin
response.overview: Join longtime friends and chefs Lidia Bastianich and Jacques Pépin for mouth-watering recipes and personal family stories. The combined knowledge of these two “good-natured bosses” doubles the fun when they come together to share the recipes that made their careers, including Lidia’s Frico Con Insalata Alla Nonna and Jacques’ Crepes Suzette.
response.title: Cooking with Legends: Lidia Bastianich & Jacques Pepin
